identity.name: Zap AI
identity.description: Multi-tenant SaaS clinic booking platform for human and pet clinics.
identity.mission: Minimalist, clean, white-based clinic operating system powered by AI.
identity.aesthetic: Setmore-inspired, Clinical Cleanliness, AI Efficiency, Trust, Hygiene, Organization.

rules: Use tight tracking (-0.02em) for headings larger than 24px.
Never use pure black (#000000) for text. Use Slate-900 for headings, Slate-600 for body.
Strictly Light Mode. No Dark Mode toggles.
Use #2563EB (Royal Blue) for primary actions (Buttons, Links, Active States).
Backgrounds must be White (#FFFFFF) or very light Slate (#F8FAFC).
Shadows should be soft and diffuse (shadow-sm, shadow-md).
FORBIDDEN: Teal Green or Teal Blue (#1B93A4) for dashboards.
Use 'Bento' grid layouts for dashboard summaries.
Dashboard Sidebar: Fixed width (240px) on desktop, collapsible on mobile.
Max-width for landing page content: max-w-7xl mx-auto.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

navigation.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 z-40 h-screen w-64 border-r bg-background
navigation.topbar: sticky top-0 z-30 flex h-16 items-center gap-4 border-b bg-background/95 px-6 backdrop-blur supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-background/60

images.alt: Friendly male doctor in white coat
images.description: Use for Hero section or 'Doctors' feature highlight.
Use for 'About Us' or 'Clinic Features' section background.
Use for 'Patient Experience' or 'CRM' feature section.

visual_enhancers.gradients: No full-screen gradients. Use subtle gradients only for 'AI' features (e.g., bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-50 to-indigo-50).
visual_enhancers.shadows: Use soft, diffuse shadows (shadow-sm, shadow-md) to create depth without clutter.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use subtle borders (border-slate-200) for cards and sections.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-md for sticky headers and overlays, but keep opacity high (bg-white/90) for legibility.

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPLEMENTATION ORDER: 1. Setup Tailwind Theme 2. Create Layouts (Sidebar, Header) 3. Build Dashboard Pages 4. Build Landing Page.
THEME: Force Light Mode. Do not implement Dark Mode toggles.
ROUTING: Use react-router-dom. Create a 'DashboardLayout' and 'PublicLayout' wrapper.
AUTH: Mock authentication flow initially if backend is not ready, but design UI for JWT handling.
RESPONSIVENESS: Mobile-first. Sidebar must collapse to a hamburger menu on mobile.
DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure contrast ratios (Slate-600 on White). Use semantic HTML.
SHADCN: Customize Shadcn components to match the 'Zap AI' rounded/clean aesthetic (override radii to 0.75rem or 1rem).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed.
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx.
